description: Letter from Abū l-Bahāʾ, in Ashmūm, to his father al-Mashmiaʿ al-Melamed (the crier/herald, the teacher), in Minyat Zifta. In Judaeo-Arabic. The writer reports that his brother was caught by the capitation tax collectors and that he had to pay for the entire family. The receipts were written in Ashmūm, as they were inhabitants of that town. (Information from Goitein's index cards)
tags: capitation tax, tax, Minyat Zifta, personal, jizya, jaliya
description_he: מכתב מאבו אל-בהאא, באשמום, לאביו אל-משמיע המלמד, במנית זיפתא. ביהודית-ערבית. הכותב מדווח שאחיו נתפס על ידי גובי מס הגולגולת ושהיה עליו לשלם עבור כל המשפחה.
